properties.remark: *** 1 FATAL, 2 INJ *** HIGH WINDS AND NEAR ZERO VISIBILITY LEAD TO 3 ACCIDENTS ON HIGHWAY 83 AROUND 2 PM NEAR REXFORD. WINDS AT THE TIME OF THE ACCIDENT WERE 35 TO 45 MPH...GUSTING TO 60 MPH. THE FIRST ACCIDENT INVOLVED TWO CARS WITH ONE INJURY. THE SECOND ACCIDENT INVOLVED TWO CARS WITH NO INJURIES. THE THIRD WAS A MAJOR ACCIDENT INVOLVING 7 SEMIS AND AT LEAST 4 PASSENGER VEHICLES. THIS ACCIDENT INVOLVED AN UNKNOWN NUMBER OF FATALITIES AND INJURIES.
